## Content safety checklist

- [ ] No company names, internal domains, customer names, personal names, or private project names.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, or private URLs.
- [ ] Official behavior claims link to official documentation where practical.
- [ ] Customer questions have been generalized.
- [ ] Screenshots or assets are scrubbed and approved.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
